rules.title: Community Rules
rules.metaDesc: NexusPlay community forum guidelines, moderator responsibilities, and reporting process
rules.intro: These rules apply to all community spaces on NexusPlay, including game forums, post comments, and reviews. Moderators of individual game forums may set additional rules. Violations may result in content removal; repeat or serious offenders may be suspended or permanently banned.
rules.footnote: This is a living document that will be updated as the community evolves. Major changes will be announced on the platform or on this page.
rules.disclaimerP1: NexusPlay is not responsible for user-generated content or the conduct of community members and moderators. We strive to maintain a safe, positive gaming community. If you see inappropriate content, please report it or contact us.
rules.disclaimerP2: The platform reserves the right to update, interpret, and enforce these rules at any time to maintain community health.
rules.rule1Title: No abuse, provocation, spam, or other disruptive behavior
rules.rule1Body: Any behavior that disrupts normal discussion is not allowed, such as repeating single words or meaningless content, excessive caps, flooding, or posting too many links. Violating content may be removed and accounts may be suspended.
rules.rule2Title: Do not post content on sensitive topics that may cause controversy
rules.rule2Body: We respect free speech, but please be mindful of others. Avoid posting extreme views on religion, race, gender, politics, or other groups in forums to prevent unnecessary conflict.
rules.rule3Title: Harassment of any kind will not be tolerated, whether the target is a member or not
rules.rule3Body: This includes inflammatory speech, threats, insults, or personal attacks. Do not publicly share others' real names, emails, photos, phone numbers, or addresses (doxxing).
rules.rule4Title: Do not impersonate any user, moderator, or administrator
rules.rule4Body: You may help answer questions, but you must not claim "official" authority, spread false announcements, or mislead other players in any way.
rules.rule5Title: Do not post unsolicited or mass advertising/promotional messages
rules.rule5Body: Forums are not for self-promotion unless a space explicitly allows it. On-topic, substantive sharing is preferred over obvious ads; excessive self-promotion may lead to suspension.
rules.rule6Title: Do not violate platform terms of use
rules.rule6Body: Including but not limited to: illegal content, malware links, unauthorized works of others, pornographic or excessively violent content, and any behavior that may harm players or platform security.
rules.moderatorsP1: "Community moderators" refers to the NexusPlay team or users authorized to manage content in specific forums. Game creators have primary responsibility for their game forums and may set supplementary rules consistent with platform policies.
rules.moderatorsP2: All moderators are subject to the same rules as regular members. If you believe a moderator is abusing their power, please report it or contact us.
rules.moderatorsP3: Moderators are responsible for maintaining forum order and may take action they deem appropriate within the rules (e.g. delete posts, warn, or request platform intervention).
rules.moderatorsP4: If you disagree with a moderator's decision, please communicate politely in private first; if unresolved, appeal to the NexusPlay team.
rules.reportingP1: If you see content in a forum that makes you uncomfortable, use the "Report" button next to the post or comment. Moderators and the platform team will review as soon as possible.
rules.reportingP2: For urgent situations or safety concerns, contact the NexusPlay team directly with links, screenshots, and timestamps when possible.
rules.reportingP3: If you are a forum moderator and find violating content, you may delete the relevant posts or comments; request a platform ban for the user if necessary.

void-gacha.description: Step into the void abyss and weave fate with mysterious virtual cards. In a gacha universe where neon meets the void, collect rare cards, build core decks, and challenge the endless depths.

core-defense.description: Build your heavy-industry mining empire and raise a steel defense line! Use precision conveyor belts and fully automated factory supply chains to hold back endless waves of alien machines. When the core goes critical, only steel and auto-turrets can win you dignity.

cyber-fortune.description: A mind game blending future big-data statistics and gambling strategy. In a neon cyber night city, use the unique 012 matrix and full-meal duel tactics to predict your opponent's next move. In a world of probability, you are the only king.
